name: Feedback – Ericsson Global Kickoff 2026
comments: Exceptional organisation from Scandic Marina. The main auditorium tech set-up was flawless — our AV team had zero issues during the plenary. Catering quality was a highlight; the Nordic buffets were a talking point for days afterwards. Our delegate app integrations worked seamlessly with the hotel WiFi infrastructure. Will absolutely return for our next global event.

name: Feedback – Novo Nordisk Pharma Sales Kickoff
comments: The team at Scandic Copenhagen exceeded all our expectations. Setup was completed early, the banquet dinner on night two was outstanding, and the event manager was reachable and proactive throughout. One minor hiccup with a late room-block check-in was resolved within 20 minutes. MD gave a standing ovation at the closing dinner — partly for the venue. We have already confirmed intent to book for 2027.

name: Feedback – IKEA Group Culture Days 2026
comments: Very good overall. Triangeln is a great venue for us — the Öresund Ballroom works perfectly for our plenary style. Some delegates mentioned the classroom sessions felt slightly cramped in Bryggan when we hit 60 people. Sustainability credentials (Nordic Swan) are important to our values and well-communicated on-site. Looking forward to 2027.

name: Feedback – Swedish Ministry Budget Retreat
comments: Professional and discreet service throughout. Grand Central Stockholm handled our confidentiality requirements appropriately. Food service was good though portion options at dinner were slightly limited for a mixed dietary group. The private entrance arrangement worked as agreed. Overall satisfied.

name: Feedback – Swedish Athletics Federation Awards Dinner
comments: Grand Ballroom at Grand Central Stockholm was a spectacular setting for the annual gala. Table dressing was beautiful and staff were genuinely attentive. The pre-dinner drinks reception in Kungssalen flowed well. President specifically asked me to pass on compliments to the banquet team. Minor point: parking guidance for guests could be clearer.

name: Feedback – Equinor H1 All-Hands Meeting
comments: Scandic Fornebu is ideally positioned for our Oslo-based delegates and the Fjord Auditorium handled our 340-person plenary comfortably. The hybrid AV capability was well-tested ahead of time — we had 180 additional remote participants with no drops. Room block was fully picked up which says something about colleague confidence in the hotel. Would recommend to other internal teams.
